name: EMMA
source_datasets: own egocentric human full-body motion + static robot data
suitability: descriptive-only: motion and trajectory data only, no language corpus
focus_en: Scales mobile manipulation by co-training egocentric human full-body motion with static robot data, avoiding mobile teleoperation.
focus_cn: 通过将第一人称人类全身运动与静态机器人数据协同训练来扩展移动操作，免去移动遥操作。
datapath_en: EMMA captures egocentric human mobile-manipulation demonstrations with Meta Project Aria glasses, recording wide-field RGB together with 3D hand and head poses. It retargets the human head trajectory into kinematically feasible mobile-base commands and aligns manipulation in camera-relative frames, then co-trains a single multi-head Transformer policy jointly on this human full-body motion and static, non-mobile robot teleoperation data, avoiding mobile teleoperation. The result is a mobile-manipulation policy for a differential-drive robot with two arms. EMMA's supervision is motion and trajectory data rather than language, and its code is listed as coming soon.
datapath_cn: EMMA 用 Meta Project Aria 眼镜采集第一人称人类移动操作演示，记录宽视场 RGB 以及 3D 手部与头部姿态。它将人类头部轨迹重定向为运动学可行的移动底盘指令，并在相机相对坐标系中对齐操作，然后在这些人类全身运动数据与静态（非移动）机器人遥操作数据上协同训练单一的多头 Transformer 策略，从而免去移动遥操作。最终得到面向双臂差速移动机器人的移动操作策略。EMMA 的监督来自运动与轨迹数据而非语言，其代码标注为即将发布。
flow_en: egocentric human demos via Project Aria glasses
retarget head pose to mobile-base commands
co-train multi-head policy with static robot data
flow_cn: 通过 Project Aria 眼镜采集第一人称人类演示
将头部姿态重定向为移动底盘指令
在相机相对坐标系中对齐操作
与静态机器人数据协同训练多头策略
no_corpus_en: EMMA is a mobile-manipulation co-training method, not an annotation source. Its human data carries motion and trajectory signals (hand, head, and base poses) rather than language, and any subtask labels it predicts are categorical rather than free-form text. Code and data are listed as coming soon, so this atlas documents EMMA descriptively rather than clustering downloaded strings.
no_corpus_cn: EMMA 是一种移动操作协同训练方法，而非标注来源。其人类数据携带的是运动与轨迹信号（手部、头部与底盘姿态）而非语言，所预测的子任务标签也是类别标签而非自由文本。代码与数据标注为即将发布，因此本图谱以描述性方式记录 EMMA，而非对下载的字符串进行聚类。
example_credit: EMMA, Zhu et al., Georgia Tech, RA-L 2026
example_caption_en: EMMA captures egocentric human full-body demos with Project Aria glasses; the project page shows the method teaser and task rollouts.
example_caption_cn: EMMA 用 Project Aria 眼镜采集第一人称人类全身演示；项目主页展示方法概览与任务执行片段。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2509.04443 and ego-moma.github.io (BibTeX zhu2026emma, IEEE RA-L 2026). Code and data are listed as coming soon; no license is stated.
citation: Zhu et al., EMMA: Scaling Mobile Manipulation via Egocentric Human Data, IEEE RA-L 2026 (arXiv:2509.04443).
